existing_features.title: Fix the design group row cards in the Total Orders tab (and all other dashboard tabs) where card content is invisible due to dark text rendering on a dark background. Ensure all text, labels, design codes, weights, quantities, and action elements inside each row card are visible with appropriate contrast against the dark card background.

Fix the Totals tab karigar name display so it shows the correct karigar name (e.g., ZYRA FACTORY) from the live design mappings instead of a stale/incorrect name (e.g., SANTU). Ensure karigar names in grouped rows reflect the current mapping data.

Fix the Karigars tab so that clicking a karigar card navigates to the karigar detail page and loads that karigar's pending orders correctly. The click handler must pass the correct karigar name and route parameters.
Fix the Ready tab to display export buttons (Excel, PDF, JPEG) so users can export orders from that tab. Ensure the export controls are rendered and functional in the Ready tab UI.

projectName: Fix dashboard design group rows invisible content and related bugs
